title: orthocarpus pusillus var. densiusculus
intro: Orthocarpus pusillus var. densiusculus, also known as the small owl's clover or slender orthocarpus, is a perennial herb that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Orthocarpus pusillus var. densiusculus are said to include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as the alleviation of menstrual cramps and other female reproductive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, or by drying the plant material to make a tincture or capsules for later use.
